blended.narrative: Bogus Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.0 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,768 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
